bundles.title: Canonical Config Loader and Default Flip
bundles.goal: Move specflow shared-policy loading to `.specflow/config.yaml`, warn-and-ignore legacy keys in `openspec/config.yaml`, and enable dispatch by default.

tasks.title: Inventory specflow-owned keys currently resolved from `openspec/config.yaml` across dispatch and review loaders.
Implement canonical reads from `.specflow/config.yaml` with default fallback in `readDispatchConfig` and `readReviewConfig`.
Add detect-only legacy probes, canonical-wins precedence, and one-time per-process deprecation warnings for misplaced keys in `openspec/config.yaml`.
Flip `DEFAULT_DISPATCH_CONFIG.enabled` to `true` and align inline comments/docstrings with the new default and canonical file location.
Preserve the shared-to-local override path at the loader boundary without changing `.specflow/config.env` loading semantics.

bundles.title: Init and Analyze Config Seeding
bundles.goal: Ensure setup and analyze flows seed specflow-owned settings into `.specflow/config.yaml` while leaving OpenSpec-owned config in `openspec/config.yaml`.

tasks.title: Reroute `specflow-init` seeding for specflow policy keys to `.specflow/config.yaml`.
Update `specflow-analyze` to read and write specflow-owned keys in `.specflow/config.yaml`.
Add a starter `.specflow/config.yaml` template and strip specflow-owned keys from the `openspec/config.yaml` template.
Keep `.specflow/config.env` seeding and local-runtime behavior unchanged while aligning file ownership comments and examples.

bundles.title: Dispatch Runtime Prerequisite Guard
bundles.goal: Add lazy runtime validation so default-enabled dispatch fails fast with actionable errors before subagent spawn when local prerequisites are missing or invalid.

tasks.title: Identify the dispatcher window-entry hook and the exact eligibility conditions that should trigger runtime validation.
Implement `verifyLocalSubagentRuntime(projectRoot)` to validate required CLI availability and main/review agent identifiers.
Gate the runtime check on effective dispatch enablement and the presence of at least one subagent-eligible bundle in the current window.
Surface an actionable failure that names both fix paths and preserves the run in `apply_draft` rather than silently falling back inline.

bundles.title: Spec and Docs Sync
bundles.goal: Synchronize specs, guides, and release notes with the new config ownership boundary, migration warning, and default-enabled dispatch behavior.

tasks.title: Update baseline specs and operator docs to define `.specflow/config.yaml` as repo-owned shared policy and `.specflow/config.env` as gitignored local override space.
Revise setup and slash-command guidance to describe dispatch as enabled by default with explicit opt-out via `apply.subagent_dispatch.enabled: false`.
Document the legacy-key deprecation warning, manual migration path, and fail-fast local runtime troubleshooting steps.
Add release-note/changelog coverage for the default flip, canonical config location, warning behavior, and rollback path.

bundles.title: Regression Coverage
bundles.goal: Cover loader migration, seeding, default-enabled dispatch, fail-fast runtime validation, and override semantics with executable regression tests.

tasks.title: Update tests that pin the old dispatch default and add explicit opt-out coverage.
Add loader tests for canonical-only reads, legacy-only reads with warning, canonical-wins duplicates, and defaults when neither file provides a value.
Add fresh-install smoke coverage for `specflow-init` and `specflow-analyze` seeding `.specflow/config.yaml` without producing deprecation warnings.
Add dispatcher tests for valid runtime, missing CLI, and invalid agent identifiers when default-enabled dispatch would engage.
Add a shared-to-local override smoke test and verify the full change stays green under spec and CI verification.
